nodes.context: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1999 in Thailand, serves as a support club for the Bandidos.
Major outlaw motorcycle club, the Diablos are a support club for them.
Rival outlaw motorcycle club that raided the Diablos' clubhouse in Australia in 2013.
Criminal group involved in violent extortion in Oulu, Finland, alongside Bandidos.

edges.context: The Diablos are a support club (puppet club) for the Bandidos.
Hells Angels raided the Diablos' clubhouse in Melbourne in 2013, leading to a shootout with Bandidos.
Hells Angels ambushed Bandidos members arriving to aid the Diablos, resulting in a shootout.
Bandidos and X-Team members were convicted together for violent extortion in Oulu in 2015.
